svg.title: Assay-Adtech frontier snapshot with seven provider rows
svg.desc: Historical Agentsia / Modelsmith Assay-Adtech frontier snapshot, included in assay-harness as provenance material during donation preparation for IAB Tech Lab. It shows Fable 5 at 44.2 percent, Opus 4.7 at 41.6 percent, GPT 5.5 at 40.4 percent, Gemini 3.5 Flash at 38.1 percent, Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview at 37.2 percent, Opus 4.8 at 36.0 percent, and GPT 5.4 at 36.0 percent. Fable 5 is marked provisional. Public claims must follow the benchmark release contract.
svg.text: Historical Agentsia / Modelsmith snapshot. Fable 5 is provisional; public claims follow the release contract.
